violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Tostadas stored in bus bins uncovered on shelf above cook line. -Two trays of salsa stored uncovered in walk in cooler. -Exposed (freezer burned) raw chicken in damaged case in 2 door freezer.--Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -2 cases of chicken stored on floor in walk in freezer.
Contaminated food disposition. — ---Tray of Salsa left at server/chip station at room temperature found did not have a time stamp present for disposal. *Disposed of at 3pm.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Wooden storage racks used in walk in cooler, walk in freezer and at dry storage are all raw/unsealed wood. -Cardboard is being used as a shelf liner (specifically noted at walk in freezer shelves). -Raw wood frames around mirrors in upstairs bathrooms.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Wooden rack at end of hotline (hot holding queso and tortillas) is worn/in need of deep clean/re-surface. -Worn particle board shelf above soda dispenser in kitchen. -Shelf at upstairs bar has chipped paint/exposed wood. -Counter top at upstairs bar has worn grout lines with warped wood near soda wand.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Dried food debris at can opener blade. -Plate used in cook line microwave left with heavy food debris after lunch. *COS-plate was replaced. -Rust present at screws used at upper edge of interior panel of ice machine.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Debris/residue/splatter at containers storing clean equipment at bottom shelf of prep area tables. -Residue/debris at lids of the bulk rice and beans. -Residue/black debris at wood racks used in walk in cooler. -Frost build up at freezer compartment of small black refrigerator next to soda dispenser. -Heavy debris/ice at interior of 2 door freezer-due for a defrost/deep clean. -Sticky residue at exterior bottom of blender pitcher used at the bar.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical ware washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Dishwasher found with 0ppm Chlorine. *Corrected on-site to 50ppm Chlorine, pushed line down to bottom of bulk chemical bucket and primed lines. (Had to prime all chemical lines while on-site.)

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Flat dishwasher tray of silverware were stored on hand sink basin upon arrival. *COS-moved to prep table to access hand wash.

Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not clean or kept in good repair. -Damage at employee restroom door. -Employee bathroom paper towels are a loose roll that are not in a dispenser. -Employee restroom lockers storing clean linens/aprons are not consistently closed. -Mop sink is not well maintained.--Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. -Upstairs bathroom doors do not self-close. -Employee restroom door does not self-close.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust/debris at walk in cooler fans and walk in freezer fans. -Walk in cooler due for deep clean: odor in unit, spills at 5 gallon buckets of queso, debris at floor, etc. -Debris/residue at floor edges throughout, specifically below prep area stainless tables.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Worn chipped paint at walls behind stainless prep tables at prep area.
Installed, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
